title: Onboarding - Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal screens - App in the background
scenario: Verify Onboarding screens remain stable and animations continue after app is backgrounded for 1-2 minutes and reopened
steps: Open the app and navigate to the Onboarding screens (Organized, Up-to-Date, Personal).
Observe the current page and animation state.
Send the app to the background (e.g., press the Home button or switch to another app).
Reopen the app (bring it back to the foreground).
Check that the app remains on the same Onboarding screen as before being backgrounded.
Verify that the content on the screen is unchanged.
Verify that the animations are still running or in the same state as before.
expected: The app stays on the same Onboarding screen with the same content and animation state after being backgrounded for 1-2 minutes and reopened.
